description: Composition:Watercress round neck t-shirt made of 70% cotton and 30% viscose, with bold chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitCelebrate your humorous side in this Mr.Funny tee from mr.men. Let everyone know that you are the one they need to reach out to to chase away the blues. A great casual t-shirt that looks best with jeans.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
